content.text: I'll read all four frames to compare the video frames against the page screenshot.
[Image: original 1280x6249, displayed at 410x2000. Multiply coordinates by 3.12 to map to original image.]

[{"ruleId":"V20","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"data.observed/lists render periwinkle blue in both media: video-01 LISTENER/SONG word lists and probe arrows are periwinkle, and page-01's mini-probe arrows and 'a.b'-style vectors are the same periwinkle. data.params render lilac purple in both: video-02's meter gauge and video-03's numeric box are lilac, matching page-01's lilac meter bars. data.heat is amber in video-02 ('-6.0') consistent with amber query usage; data.error is rose pink in video-03 ('size passes through' flag) with no conflicting page color. No concept flips color between video and page.","suggestion":"None; semantic colors are locked across both media."},{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All frames use only Night School palette: deep navy bg, warm cream text (labels/headings in video-01..03 and page-01 body), periwinkle blue, lilac purple, amber (video-02 '-6.0'), rose pink (video-03 flag). No saturated out-of-palette primary red/green/blue appears in either medium.","suggestion":"None."},{"ruleId":"V22","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"video-01..03 and page-01 share the same deep navy background and warm-cream serif typographic temperature; the page's embedded interactive reuses the same periwinkle probe/lilac meter vocabulary as the video, reading as one product family.","suggestion":"None."}]
